name: Rodney Howard-Browne
role: Founder and Senior Pastor, The River at Tampa Bay Church, Tampa, Florida
incident: Rodney Howard-Browne, South African-born founder of The River at Tampa Bay Church, was arrested on March 30, 2020 on charges of unlawful assembly and violation of a public health emergency order after holding two packed church services on March 29 in defiance of Hillsborough County's stay-at-home order. Howard-Browne had built his ministry on teaching that divine healing supersedes medical authority, while simultaneously requiring all church staff to sign legal liability waivers.
